content: Beta 2 brings project-scoped custom skills, skill collections, and Zed editor support.
The skills library now groups related skills into collections, and you can create skills that live within a single project for project-specific agent instructions.
We've also made a pass on accessibility — form fields now meet WCAG 2.2 contrast requirements, and light themes have proper backgrounds.
- Sync progress bar shows visual feedback during project sync
- Commands can now be included in project templates
- Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages added to Settings
- Alphabetical sorting across agents, skills, and MCP servers in project views
- Multi-skill repository imports now pull all skills correctly
We've been listening to your feedback and we're excited to share what's new in this release.

You asked for a cleaner Settings experience, so we consolidated Support, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Service into a single page — fewer tabs, less hunting around. We also pulled Appearance out into its own section so theming is easier to find.
- You can now unsubscribe from the Automatic newsletter directly from Settings
- The setup wizard now lives inside Settings too, so you can re-run it any time
- This "What's New" section you're reading right now — we'll keep you posted on updates here
